title: lithocarpus recurvatus
intro: Lithocarpus recurvatus, also known as the California nutmeg tree or canyon live oak, is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus recurvatus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lithocarpus recurvatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
